title: FAANG Staff+ Preparation Study Plan
description: A comprehensive 40-Day daily study plan structured from basic computer science up to advanced Staff+ GenAI, AI Infrastructure, and engineering leadership. Total recommended daily effort: 4–5 hours.

timeline.title: Language Basics & Complexity
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): History of Python & Data Types & Operations.
Practice (2h): Write basic control flow structures and analyze Time & Space Complexity.

timeline.title: Data Structures Foundations
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Built-in Collections & Linked Lists.
Practice (2h): Implement custom stacks and queues from scratch (Stacks & Queues).

timeline.title: Advanced Data Structures
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Priority Queues & Heaps & Trees & BSTs.
Practice (2h): Implement traversal algorithms in Graphs & Networks.

timeline.title: OOP & Exception Safety
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): OOP & Design Patterns & Testing & Mocking.
Practice (2h): Build robust custom exception scopes using Exception Handling.

timeline.title: Memory & Concurrency
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Memory Management & GC & Type Hints & Mypy.
Practice (2h): Implement thread pools and process isolation in Multithreading & Concurrency.

timeline.title: Algorithms & Profiling
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Algorithms & Patterns & Functional Programming Patterns.
Practice (2h): Profile application bottlenecks using Performance Optimization.

timeline.title: Technical Planning & OS
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Google Staff Culture & Design Docs.
Practice (2h): Review low-level kernel boundaries and network buffers in Operating Systems.

timeline.title: Networking & Systems Basics
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Computer Networks & OOP Staff+.
Practice (2h): Model network socket interactions and asynchronous protocol handlers.

timeline.title: Database Fundamentals
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Database Fundamentals (indexing, ACID properties).
Practice (2h): Design dynamic relational schemas matching third normal form.

timeline.title: Distributed Databases
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Database Systems Staff+ (LSM-trees, MVCC, distributed consistency).
Practice (2h): Analyze query execution plans and index lookups.

timeline.title: API Design Protocols
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): API Design for Staff+ Engineers (REST, GraphQL, gRPC).
Practice (2h): Draft OpenAPI contracts for concurrent microservices.

timeline.title: System Design Fundamentals
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): System Design Fundamentals (consistent hashing, load balancing).
Practice (1.5h): Design a globally distributed key-value store.

timeline.title: Staff+ System Design
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): System Design Staff+ Prep (scale to 1B, high-availability clusters).
Practice (2h): Model a multi-region social feed aggregator.

timeline.title: Distributed Consensus
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Distributed Systems Staff+ (Paxos, Raft, event sourcing).
Practice (2h): Implement basic vector clocks or logical timestamp trackers.

timeline.title: SRE & Scalability
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Site Reliability Engineering Staff+ & Engineering Patterns.
Practice (2h): Define SLIs, SLOs, and model rate limiters.

timeline.title: Security Engineering
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Security Engineering Staff+ & DSA Staff+.
Practice (2h): Perform threat modeling on token validation endpoints.

timeline.title: Classic ML Fundamentals
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): ML Fundamentals & ML Math.
Practice (2h): Write matrix operations using linear algebra utilities.

timeline.title: Supervised Learning Models
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Supervised Learning & Unsupervised Learning.
Practice (2h): Design custom data pipelines using Data-Centric AI.

timeline.title: A/B Testing & NN Intro
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): A/B Testing & Intro to Neural Networks.
Practice (2h): Calculate sample size requirements and variance reduction (CUPED).

timeline.title: Neural Networks Training
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Activation Functions & NN Training.
Practice (2h): Code backpropagation calculations from scratch.

timeline.title: Neural Net Architectures
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Types of ANNs & Foundations from Scratch.
Practice (2h): Implement multi-head self-attention module in PyTorch.

timeline.title: ML Coding Patterns & Papers
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): ML Research Papers.
Practice (2h): Implement online algorithms in ML Coding Patterns.

timeline.title: ML System Design & Recs
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): ML System Design & Recommendation Systems.
Practice (2h): Design two-tower recommendation retrieval network.

timeline.title: NLP, CV & GPU Deep Dive
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): NLP Deep Dive, Computer Vision & GPU Deep Dive.
Practice (1.5h): Compute GPU memory constraints for training parameters.

timeline.title: Staff+ ML Platforms
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Staff+ ML System Design & Production ML Ops.
Practice (2h): Model active learning pipelines and data drift controls.

timeline.title: LLM Architectures
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): LLM Architecture & Transformer Architecture.
Practice (2h): Model parameter counting and distributed training recipes.

timeline.title: Applied LLM Engineering
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Prompt Engineering & RAG at Scale.
Practice (2h): Configure fine-tuning parameters for domain adaptation (Fine-Tuning & PEFT).

timeline.title: LLM Agents & Context
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): LLM Agents & Long-Context & Prompt Caching.
Practice (2h): Implement multi-agent workflows.

timeline.title: Agent Infrastructure & Serving
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): Advanced Agent Architectures & LLM Serving & Deployment.
Practice (2h): Integrate tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

timeline.title: LLM Optimization & Safety
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Inference Optimization & Alignment & Safety.
Practice (2h): Construct evaluation guardrails for model security.

timeline.title: Staff+ Career Guide
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Staff+ Career Navigation & FAANG Engineering Facts.
Practice (2h): Draft architectural summaries for promotion packages.

timeline.title: Behavioral & Product Strategy
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Staff+ Behavioral & Leadership & Product Sense for Staff+.
Practice (2h): Solve a product design scenario from the guide.

timeline.title: Behavioral STAR Scenarios
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): ML Behavioral Interview (STAR) & ML Leadership & Strategy.
Practice (2h): Refine answers to core behavioral questions (Chestnut Questions).

timeline.title: Mock Interviews & Strategy
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (1.5h): Mock Interview Walkthroughs.
Practice (3h): Perform mock rounds based on FAANG Company Focus.

timeline.title: Distributed Training Deep Dive
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Distributed Training Infrastructure (3D Parallelism, NCCL, ZeRO).
Practice (2h): Math and memory modeling for pipeline bubbles.

timeline.title: ML Platforms & Features
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): ML Platform Design (Feast, training-serving skew).
Practice (2h): Build point-in-time temporal joins.

timeline.title: Model Compilation & Kernels
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Model Compilation & Kernels (torch.compile, Triton, XLA).
Practice (2h): Study block offsets in Triton kernel functions.

timeline.title: ML Data Engineering at Scale
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Data Engineering for ML at Scale (LSH, MinHash, Beam/Ray).
Practice (2h): Write deduplication shingles code.

timeline.title: Vector Databases & Search
timeline.event:
Total: 4 Hours
Core Theory (2h): Vector Search Infrastructure (HNSW, IVF-PQ, hybrid fusion).
Practice (2h): Implement Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

timeline.title: FinOps & Emerging Architectures
timeline.event:
Total: 4.5 Hours
Core Theory (2.5h): LLM Cost Engineering & Emerging AI Architectures (Mamba, Diffusion, test-time compute).
Practice (2h): Calculate compute-crossover point math.

details: A structured 40-day prep curriculum designed to transition a developer from core concepts to Staff+ architectural, infrastructure, and leadership execution.
